common.askPlaceholder: Ask Foxora — e.g. "How does the cap work?"

home.kicker: Start Kit · v2.0 · AT GmbH × Dubai FZE
home.title:
Foxora Start.
The next 180 days.
home.lead: A premium loyalty program with a hard 100% cap. No yields, no pyramid — a clean dual structure between Klagenfurt and Dubai, built for the next 180 days.

pillars.title: Premium activation
pillars.body: One-time €250. Like a Costco membership — you're a member, not a speculator.

pillars.title: 100% cap. Period.
pillars.body: Cashback up to your own activation. Then it ends. Clean math.

pillars.title: Global structure
pillars.body: Brand and IP in Austria. App operations in Dubai. Cleanly separated, by design.

home.miniCalcTitle: How fast does my cap fill?
home.miniCalcLead: Quick simulation here — full calculator on the model page.
home.closingLead: Look at the model, ask questions, or write us directly.

modell.title:
Cashback with a hard cap.
Built for clarity.
modell.lead: Foxora is a premium loyalty program. Members pay a one-time €250, get cashback up to their own activation — then it ends. No extension, no pyramid.

steps.title: Activate
steps.body: Pay €250 once and become a member. Premium terms at all partners immediately.

steps.title: Use
steps.body: Shop at partners or take their services. Cashback flows back automatically.

steps.title: Hit the cap
steps.body: Once cumulative payout reaches €250, cashback ends. Membership stays, benefits stay.

premium.label: Premium cashback
premium.title: Membership volume
premium.body: Activations fund the cashback engine itself. The hard cap guarantees that payout per member can never exceed their own deposit — the model is mathematically closed.

saas.label: SaaS funding
saas.title: B2B tools for partners
saas.body: Partner companies pay for backend tools (dashboards, API, anti-fraud). Steady MRR stream, independent of the activation funnel.

btc.label: BTC swap
btc.title: Treasury hedge
btc.body: Part of treasury is hedged via BTC swaps against inflation and currency swings. This is treasury of the GmbH / FZ-LLC — not speculation on customer money.

modell.calcLead: Play with the numbers. Then let Foxora explain the result.

faq.a: No. Foxora is a premium loyalty program — comparable to a Costco membership. You pay for benefits, not yield.
When your cumulative payout reaches 100% of your activation. Period. Membership stays, but there are no further cashback payouts.
Only as a treasury hedge of the companies. Customers pay, hold, and receive in EUR only. No token, no crypto investment.
Klagenfurt / Vienna holds brand, IP, and DACH compliance. Dubai operates the global app. Clean split, documented IP license.

struktur.title: AT GmbH × Dubai FZ-LLC
struktur.lead: Two entities, one mission. Brand and IP in Austria. App operations and global scale in Dubai. Connected via a cleanly documented IP license.
struktur.flowBody: The AT GmbH licenses the brand and software IP to the Dubai FZ-LLC. In return, an arm's length royalty / service fee flows back — documented, auditable, transfer-pricing-aligned.

complianceItems.title: GDPR
complianceItems.body: Data processing in EU cloud, DPAs with every partner.

complianceItems.title: AT statutory accounts
complianceItems.body: Annual report under UGB, tax advisor in Klagenfurt, FinanzOnline filings.

complianceItems.title: UAE Corporate Tax
complianceItems.body: 9% corporate tax above AED 375,000. Clean quarterly bookkeeping in Dubai.

complianceItems.title: Not a regulated financial product
complianceItems.body: Premium loyalty is not an FMA / BaFin regulated product. Activations are booked as membership revenue.

roadmap.title: The next 180 days.
roadmap.lead: Four phases of 45 days each. Concrete goals, measurable deliverables, clear ownership.

phases.label: Phase 1 · Day 1–45
phases.title: Setup
goals: Register Foxora FZ-LLC in DMCC or IFZA
Sign IP license agreement AT → Dubai
MVP app: cashback engine + member onboarding

phases.label: Phase 3 · Day 91–135
phases.title: Scale
goals: Treasury strategy with BTC hedge implemented

phases.label: Phase 4 · Day 136–180
phases.title: Consolidation
goals: Audit trail of all cashback flows
Series-ready: pitch deck, data room, cap table

manifesto.title:
Loyalty the way it
should have been.
manifesto.lead: We're building Foxora for people who are done with token promises, opaque returns, and programs that take more from their members than they give. This is our manifesto — six sentences we want to be measured against.

tenets.title: The cap is sacred.
tenets.body: 100% of your activation. Not a cent more. No bonus tiers, no special promotions, no "extended levels". When the cap is reached, it's reached — and the math behind it is open for anyone to inspect.

tenets.title: A membership, not an investment.
tenets.body: Pay €250 and you're buying access to premium conditions — like Costco, like AmEx Platinum. No projected returns, no equity, no security. We don't call it that, we don't treat it that way.

tenets.title: Clean structures, on the record.
tenets.body: AT GmbH for brand and IP. Dubai FZ-LLC for global app operations. An arms-length IP license contract between them. Every euro has a receipt, every decision a memo.

tenets.title: No crypto in the member journey.
tenets.body: Members pay in EUR, hold in EUR, get paid in EUR. The only contact with BTC is the corporate treasury hedge against inflation — that's balance-sheet hygiene, not a product.

tenets.title: Partners earn, not Foxora.
tenets.body: The lion's share of spend flows to the partner businesses that deliver the experience. Our margin comes from membership volume and SaaS tools — not from inflated cashback terms no one can sustain.

tenets.title: 180 days. Then numbers speak.
tenets.body: We're not promising anything for 2030. We're building a program that, after 180 days, has an audit trail — members, partners, cashback flows, balance sheet. People who start with us see the outcome, not the pitch.

manifesto.closingTitle: If you can sign this, you're one of us.
manifesto.closingLead: Foxora isn't a promise about the future. It's a bet on clean work, documented structures, and a model you can explain on the back of a coaster.

kontakt.title: Write to us.
kontakt.lead: Member, partner, press, or investor — we respond within 48 hours.

impressum.title: Disclosure & provider identification

sections.title: Authorised representatives
lines: Companies register: filing with the Klagenfurt Regional Court in progress

sections.title: Business purpose
lines: Operation of a premium loyalty programme, including the associated software and platform services.

sections.title: Sister entity
lines: DMCC / IFZA, Dubai, United Arab Emirates
Runs app operations and international distribution under an IP licence agreement with Foxora GmbH.

sections.title: Supervisory authority
lines: Foxora is not a financial product requiring authorisation. Membership fees are booked as loyalty membership revenue.

sections.title: Dispute resolution
lines: The EU Commission provides an online dispute resolution platform: https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr
We are not willing or obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

sections.title: Liability for content
lines: Content on this site was prepared with the greatest care. No guarantee is given for accuracy, completeness, or timeliness.
Statements about the corporate structure describe the planned end state of the Foxora Start Kit — see the roadmap for the current build status.

impressum.placeholderNote: Note: Address and companies-register details will be filled in once Foxora GmbH is incorporated.

datenschutz.title: How we handle data.
datenschutz.lead: Privacy notice pursuant to Art. 13 GDPR. We collect as little as possible, only what we need, and we say openly what we do.

sections.title: Controller
sections.body: Foxora GmbH (in formation), Musterstraße 1, 9020 Klagenfurt, Austria. Contact: hello@foxora.io.

sections.title: Purposes of processing
sections.body: Operation of the website, response to contact requests, operation of the loyalty programme (once live), and fulfilment of statutory retention obligations.

sections.title: Contact form
sections.body: If you reach out through the form, we process your name, email, topic, and message solely to respond to your request. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(b) and (f) GDPR. Delivery is handled by Resend (resend.com) with servers in the EU. Retention: maximum 24 months after last contact.

sections.title: Server logs
sections.body: When you visit the site, our host (Vercel Inc., USA) automatically processes IP address, timestamp, path, and user agent for 30 days to protect against abuse. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR. A DPA with Standard Contractual Clauses is in place.

sections.title: AI chat ("Talk to Foxora")
sections.body: Chat inputs are forwarded to Anthropic (USA, EU models) for response generation. No identifiers or cookies are sent. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR. Please do not enter sensitive or personal data in the chat.

sections.title: Cookies
sections.body: We only use technically necessary cookies: language preference and theme. No tracking cookies, no analytics without your consent.

sections.title: Your rights
sections.body: Access, rectification, erasure, restriction, data portability, and objection (Art. 15–22 GDPR). Complaints can be filed with the Austrian Data Protection Authority (dsb.gv.at).

sections.title: Changes
sections.body: We adapt this notice to new features or legal changes. Last updated: June 2026.
